projectDescription: An educational Java tool for propositional logic that translates natural-language Spanish statements into formal logical formulas, evaluates them as tautologies, contradictions, or contingencies, and generates truth tables and step-by-step explanations.
keyFeatures: Propositional formula evaluation: tautology, contradiction, contingency detection
NLP pipeline (no ML) to translate Spanish natural language into logic formulas
Truth table generation for formulas with up to 4 variables
Evaluation tree visualization for step-by-step logical reasoning
LogicScript DSL (.lgs) for declarative lemma, lexrule, and semantic pattern definitions
LogicScript CLI for command-line natural language translation and evaluation
Morphological normalizer for Spanish verb conjugation reduction to infinitives
Swing-based GUI with natural-language and formula input modes
Educational explanation builder that produces human-readable proofs
publicApiSurface: SemanticMapper.mapearBloque(String textoBloque, List<TokenNatural> tokens, List<String> pasosDeAnalisis)
